name: Ginger Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together 2 cups flour, salt, ginger, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and molasses.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring constantly until just combined.
4. Stir in the melted shortening and grated cheese until evenly distributed.
5. Fill prepared muffin tins about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Serve warm, enjoying the delightful combination of ginger and cheese in every bite.
